## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this change needed?

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `uv run pytest`
- [ ] I ran `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] I updated docs or comments if behavior changed
- [ ] I checked for data leakage / backtest leakage if the change touches modeling logic
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, raw cache files, or local environment files
